problem_text_cn: 1412 为了判断一种穿透力很强的粒子是不是$\gamma$光子，科学家们作了如下工作：(a) 测量该“光子”在铅中穿透时的衰减，估计出它的能量约为$15\ \mathrm{MeV}$；(b) 将此粒子束轰击石蜡($\mathrm{CH_4}$)，产生出大量质子，质子的最大反冲能为$5.7\ \mathrm{MeV}$。试由上述两个实验结果，通过计算判断该粒子究竟是不是$\gamma$光子。（电子静能$m_ec^2 = 0.511\ \mathrm{MeV}$，$hc = 12400\ \mathrm{eV \cdot \AA}$）
problem_text_en: 1412 To determine if a highly penetrating particle is a gamma photon, scientists performed the following: (a) Measured its attenuation in lead, estimating its energy to be about $15\ \mathrm{MeV}$; (b) Bombarded paraffin ($\mathrm{CH_4}$) with this particle beam, producing a large number of protons, with a maximum recoil energy of $5.7\ \mathrm{MeV}$. Using these two experimental results, calculate and determine if the particle is indeed a gamma photon. (Electron rest energy $m_ec^2 = 0.511\ \mathrm{MeV}$, $hc = 12400\ \mathrm{eV \cdot \AA}$)
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】假设该粒子是$\gamma$光子，利用康普顿效应（质子反冲）的相对论公式，由最大反冲能$E_k = 5.7\ \mathrm{MeV}$反推出入射光子所需能量$h\nu = 55\ \mathrm{MeV}$，与实验(a)的$15\ \mathrm{MeV}$不符；反之，若$h\nu = 15\ \mathrm{MeV}$，则最大反冲能仅为$0.46\ \mathrm{MeV}$，与实验(b)不符。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Assume the particle is a gamma photon. Using the relativistic formula for the Compton effect (proton recoil), the required incident photon energy $h\nu = 55\ \mathrm{MeV}$ is calculated from the maximum recoil energy $E_k = 5.7\ \mathrm{MeV}$, which contradicts the $15\ \mathrm{MeV}$ from experiment (a). Conversely, if $h\nu = 15\ \mathrm{MeV}$, the maximum recoil energy is only $0.46\ \mathrm{MeV}$, contradicting experiment (b).
problem_answer: 该粒子**不是$\gamma$光子**。若要产生$5.7\ \mathrm{MeV}$的最大质子反冲能，入射$\gamma$光子能量需为$55\ \mathrm{MeV}$，远大于$15\ \mathrm{MeV}$；若入射能量为$15\ \mathrm{MeV}$，则最大反冲能仅为$0.46\ \mathrm{MeV}$，与实验结果矛盾。
